creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

User needs to rebuild config to keep it in sync with the kernel 
if he is going to cvsup -stable or should not cvsup -stable at 
all - this problem has probably been reported over 50 times by people 
who failed to do so (and when I see Justin, I'm going to skin him 
for bringing only part of CAM into -stable this way and generating 
over 50 of these reports in the process :).
